description:
Test fixtures for lint rules. Each fixture asserts that running the full lint pass produces a specific set of rule hits. blocklist/regex/simple-check rules are tested automatically; rules with NL `check` get a 'manual' marker.

Note on concept-without-product-name: this rule fires when the title has NO anchor (no product name in Formula 2 shape, no first-person, no Self-hosted/Open-source prefix). Many short violation fixtures intentionally include it as an expected hit.

cases.name: clean-formula-1-title
cases.input: Show HN: I built a self-hosted cost tracker (MIT)

cases.name: clean-formula-2-title
cases.input: Show HN: Pico – a tiny static site generator in Rust

cases.name: clean-formula-11-self-hosted
cases.input: Show HN: Self-hosted observability for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini

cases.name: ai-tool-honest-mention
cases.input: Show HN: I built a self-hosted LLM cost tracker (MIT)
cases.note: Legitimate LLM-tool title hits ai-saturation as a warn — user decides if the tradeoff is worth it. Rule is warn, not reject.

cases.name: title-too-long
cases.input: Show HN: An incredibly comprehensive end-to-end observability platform for modern distributed engineering teams

cases.name: emoji-rejected
cases.input: Show HN: 🚀 Foo, a faster bar

cases.name: em-dash-rejected
cases.input: Show HN: Foo — a tiny thing

cases.name: missing-prefix
cases.input: show hn: foo

cases.name: multiple-exclamation-title
cases.input: Show HN: Foo!! The new thing!!

cases.name: hype-words-generic
cases.input: Show HN: Foo – a revolutionary seamless solution

cases.name: ai-saturation
cases.input: Show HN: An AI tool that helps developers

cases.name: buzzword-stack-2026
cases.input: Show HN: Foo – agentic RAG-powered LLM-native workflows

cases.name: upvote-begging-body
cases.input: I built this last weekend. Please upvote if you find it useful, it would mean a lot.

cases.name: apology-self-promo
cases.input: Sorry for the self-promotion, but I built a thing. Hope this is allowed.

cases.name: lurker-coming-out
cases.input: Long-time lurker, first time posting on HN. I made this tool that does X.

cases.name: preemptive-praise
cases.input: Super proud to share this beautiful UI I lovingly crafted over six months.

cases.name: meta-narrative
cases.input: TL;DR: sorry this is a long post. If you read this far, the tool is at foo.com.

cases.name: weak-ask-body
cases.input: Built this over the weekend. Let me know what you think! Feedback welcome.

cases.name: hype-saas-body
cases.input: Our enterprise-grade end-to-end solution helps teams streamline their workflow and unlock value.

cases.name: hype-devtool-body
cases.input: Zero-config, buttery smooth, blazingly fast. Just works.

cases.name: competitor-callout
cases.input: Show HN: Foo – open-source alternative to Bar

cases.name: provider-list-not-competitor
cases.input: Show HN: Self-hosted observability for OpenAI
cases.note: Listing a supported provider is feature disclosure, not a competitor callout. Rule fires only on rivalry framing.

cases.name: question-title
cases.input: Show HN: Why is Postgres slow on writes?

cases.name: non-english-content
cases.input: 이 도구는 LLM 비용을 추적합니다.

cases.name: title-case-everything
cases.input: Show HN: A New Way To Build Better Software Faster

cases.name: clean-body-with-specific-ask
cases.input: I built a self-hosted cost tracker for API calls. One line change to your OpenAI client and every request shows up in a dashboard with the cost calculated per model. It runs as one Docker container, uses ClickHouse for storage, and the proxy adds under 5 milliseconds on the hot path. MIT licensed. The repo has the full schema documented if anyone wants to fork it. Curious which providers you would want supported next. Bedrock and Vertex are first in the queue, plus a few smaller ones if there is demand. Happy to dive into the cost calculation edge cases for fine-tuned models, cached prompts, and image inputs.

cases.name: metrics-flex-title
cases.input: Show HN: How I got 10000 users in 6 months

cases.name: concept-only-no-anchor
cases.input: Show HN: Local data redaction for any AI tools
cases.note: Failed-corpus archetype: concept + AI saturation. No product name, no first-person, no Self-hosted/Open-source prefix.

cases.name: all-caps-emphasis-rejected
cases.input: Show HN: An AMAZING tool for engineers

cases.name: all-caps-acronym-allowed
cases.input: Show HN: Self-hosted REST API gateway with JWT auth
cases.note: REST, API, JWT all in acronym whitelist. all-caps-emphasis should NOT fire.
